EXERCISE / MODULE 1: 6 DECISIONS BEFORE YOUR WEBINAR
This exercise h elps you answer th e question:
WHAT ARE THE 6 DECISIONS YOU NEED
TO MAKE BEFORE CREATING YOUR
WEBINAR?
Each of the questions below is key to defining the nature of your webinar,
getting the right people to attend, and getting those who attend ready to buy
your product.
The problem with many webinars is that they don’t try to solve a specific
problem, or the problem they teach isn’t something people really want
solved, or they give tips, not solutions, or they don’t drill into how the problem
is affecting the avatar’s life before they solve it, or the solution isn’t believable.
Spend time answering the questions below and you can avoid these
problems.
1. What market are you targeting?
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
2. What are their biggest needs?
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
3. What transformation will you offer? What is your transformation
statement (use this transformation statement formula: “What they’ll do
so that….. [what the benefit will be to them}?
